fps.average_note: Includes warmup frame(s) — see inference_time_ms.steady_state for the fairer figure.

inference_time_ms.first_frame_note: First-call PyTorch/CUDA init cost — expected to be much larger than steady-state; excluded from averages below.

cpu_usage_percent.note: process_avg can exceed 100% on a multi-core machine (e.g. 250% = 2.5 cores fully used) — this is normal psutil behavior, not a bug.

tracking_accuracy_proxies.note: Ground-truth-free proxies, NOT MOTA/IDF1 — see module docstring.
